title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Roger, Unknown person #2, Rayleigh, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All I have to do is take their treasure, right?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Dealing with them won't be easy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Roger Pirates are on a different level than the enemies we've faced before!!!

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: Should we cut him into pieces, Rayleigh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wouldn't want my two best men to get hurt!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You just want to face him yourself...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The aura of a Wild Beast!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: How many years has it been, newgate?!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 32 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
